items.headline: Game Recap: Raptors 112, Cavaliers 110
items.description: The Raptors defeated the Cavaliers, 112-110, in overtime to force a Game 7 and tie the series at 3-3.

items.headline: Game Recap: Lakers 98, Rockets 78
items.description: The Lakers defeated the Rockets, 98-78, to win the series 4-2 and advance to the Western Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: LeBron James puts on vintage performance in Game 6 victory
items.description: LeBron James finishes with 28 points, seven rebounds and eight assists as the Lakers defeat the Rockets in Game 6.
